problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
